bug_report.summary: LinkButton Text loses leading non-ASCII character “Ü” after setting Text to “Überblick”
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new UI scene with a root Control node.
Add a LinkButton node and select it.
In the Inspector, set LinkButton → Text to `Überblick`.
expected_behaviors: The Inspector Text field should display `Überblick` exactly as entered (including the leading “Ü”).
The LinkButton label in the 2D viewport should render `Überblick` (including “Ü”).
actual_behaviors: The displayed text appears as `berblick` (leading “Ü” missing) in the Inspector and/or on the LinkButton in the viewport.
